summary: Deep analysis of the critical flaw in the current time-windowed approach: campaign metrics are stored as aggregates (totals), not daily time-series. When a campaign is disconnected, its total is removed from all calculations, retroactively distorting historical data. The solution: treat ads data like ref counts — cache daily metrics per campaign, and use the ledger to determine attribution per day. Includes a full worked example with 100 days of data across 5 phases (connect, fill, disconnect, gap, reconnect) and a comparison table showing the wrong vs. correct approach for each phase.
